name: migrapilot-vscode-extension
description: MigraPilot AI SRE and operator cockpit for MigraTeck infrastructure, code, and control-plane workflows

chatParticipants.name: migrapilot
chatParticipants.description: Operate on this workspace with MigraPilot

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_searchWorkspace
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search workspace text with ripgrep.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the open workspace for text matches. Use before answering questions about unknown files, symbols, routes, copy, or implementations. Returns verified file paths, line numbers, and matching text.

query.description: Text or regex to search for.

include.description: Optional glob include pattern, for example **/*.ts.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_listFiles
languageModelTools.userDescription: List files in the open workspace.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List workspace files using include/exclude globs. Use to discover project structure before reading or editing files.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_readFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read a workspace file.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read a file from the open workspace. Use with verified paths only. Supports line ranges and truncation.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_diagnostics
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read VS Code diagnostics.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return current VS Code diagnostics for one file or the whole workspace. Use before and after edits to understand TypeScript, lint, and language-server errors.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_gitDiff
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read git diff.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read current git diff, optionally for one path or staged changes. Use for review, summary, and avoiding overwrite of user edits.

staged.description: Read staged diff instead of unstaged diff.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_runCommand
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run a workspace shell command after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a command in the workspace shell. Use for tests, builds, formatters, and diagnostics. This has side effects and requires user confirmation.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_replaceInFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Replace exact text in a workspace file after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Apply a precise single-file replacement. Use only after reading the target file and matching exact old text. Requires user confirmation.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_createFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create or overwrite a workspace file after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file when overwrite is true. Requires user confirmation.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite if the file exists.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_batchWriteFiles
languageModelTools.userDescription: Write multiple workspace files after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create or overwrite multiple files in one confirmed operation. Use for multi-file website/app implementation after planning exact file contents.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_moveFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Move or rename a workspace file after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Move or rename a workspace file. Use when restructuring a site or app. Requires user confirmation.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_deleteFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Move a workspace file or folder to trash after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete a workspace file or folder by moving it to trash. Use only when clearly required. Requires user confirmation.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_applyPatch
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check or apply a unified git patch after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use git apply to check or apply a unified patch across files. Prefer checkOnly first for risky patches. Applying requires user confirmation.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_scaffoldWebsite
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a Vite React TypeScript website starter after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Scaffold a polished Vite React TypeScript website starter with package.json, index.html, source files, and responsive CSS. Use to start a new website/app. Can optionally run npm install.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_startDevServer
languageModelTools.userDescription: Start a local dev server after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Start a long-running local dev server and capture output plus detected localhost URL. Use before previewing or browser-auditing a website.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_stopDevServer
languageModelTools.userDescription: Stop MigraPilot-managed dev servers after confirmation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Stop one or all dev servers previously started by MigraPilot.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_listDevServers
languageModelTools.userDescription: List MigraPilot-managed dev servers.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return running MigraPilot-managed dev server ids, commands, detected URLs, and recent output.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_openPreview
languageModelTools.userDescription: Open a URL in VS Code Simple Browser or externally.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Open a website preview URL for the user. Use after starting a dev server.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_browserAudit
languageModelTools.userDescription: Use Playwright on demand to screenshot and audit desktop/mobile layouts.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run an on-demand Playwright audit against a URL. Captures desktop and mobile screenshots, console/page errors, horizontal overflow, text overflow, links, and a JSON report.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_websiteTask
languageModelTools.userDescription: Prepare a full website/app build loop with files, diagnostics, and recommended next steps.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use at the start of a website/app task. Returns discovered app files, diagnostics, and the recommended edit-build-preview-audit loop.

languageModelTools.name: migrapilot_activeContext
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read active editor context.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return open workspace folders, active file, visible files, and selected text. Use to ground requests like 'fix this' or 'explain this'.

commands.title: MigraPilot: Send Terminal Output to Chat

migrapilot.autoStartBrain.description: Automatically start and keep the local Start Pilot API task running when the configured localhost brain is unreachable, including after reloads and periodic health checks.

migrapilot.runnerTarget.description: Preferred runner target for execute requests

migrapilot.auditPath.description: Workspace-relative path used for persisted MigraPilot audit records.

migrapilot.preflightMaxAgeMinutes.description: Maximum age in minutes for a preflight audit record to be considered fresh for guarded operations.

migrapilot.requirePreflightForRemoteWrit.description: Require a fresh successful preflight before remote or production write operations are sent through the Brain API.

migrapilot.authToken.markdownDescription: Bearer JWT used for pilot-api requests. Required for remote or production brain URLs.

migrapilot.nativeChat.provider.description: Preferred model provider for the native @migrapilot chat participant. Auto lets pilot-api route by task; Sonnet is best for coding-agent work.

migrapilot.nativeChat.vscodeToolBridge.e.description: Allow @migrapilot to use VS Code registered chat tools and MCP tools before calling the MigraPilot backend.

migrapilot.nativeChat.vscodeToolBridge.m.description: Maximum VS Code tools to expose to the @migrapilot tool bridge.
Maximum VS Code tool-calling rounds before @migrapilot sends results to the MigraPilot backend.

migrapilot.mcp.enabled.description: Expose MigraPilot as a standalone MCP server. Disabled by default because @migrapilot can already use VS Code and MCP tools through the native tool bridge.

migrapilot.completions.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key sent as `x-ops-api-token` to Brain API for inline completions. Leave blank to rely on JWT auth or localhost open access.

migrapilot.completions.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for automatic inline completion triggers

migrapilot.completions.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to request for each inline completion

migrapilot.completions.maxPrefixLines.description: Maximum lines before the cursor to include as prefix context

migrapilot.completions.maxSuffixLines.description: Maximum lines after the cursor to include as suffix context
